855.reason: The speculative parsing of the expression triggers error reporting (e.g., missing ')') which is permanently added to the error list. When parseExpStmt() is called later, it re-parses the same expression and reports the same error again, causing duplicate error output.

reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 1.0 , reason:  The speculative parsing of the expression triggers error reporting (e.g., missing ')') which is permanently added to the error list. When parseExpStmt() is called later, it re-parses the same expression and reports the same error again, causing duplicate error output.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 1.0 , reason:  This call parses the expression to lookahead for assignment. If the expression contains a syntax error (like missing ')'), the error is reported here. When the parser rewinds and calls parseExpStmt(), the error is reported again, causing duplicate error output.
